name: rust-ffi-bridge
description: Create a C-compatible FFI bridge for a Rust crate so the C++ core can call it. Use when a Rust component needs to be callable from the existing C++ pipeline.
principles: One bridge header per crate (e.g. prisma_cache_c.h)
No exceptions — all errors mapped to status codes
Panic firewall: catch_unwind at every entry point

template.c_header: typedef struct prisma_cache_t prisma_cache_t;\nprisma_status prisma_cache_create(...);\nvoid prisma_cache_destroy(prisma_cache_t*);
